expected_reason: external_all_pass is false. This fixture isolates a release-grade external signer / verification policy failure for unsigned external evidence while keeping external_summaries_present=true, detectors_materialized_ok=true, diagnostics.gates_stubbed=false, and all non-target required gates passing.
authority_boundary: This fixture does not define release authority. It documents an expected fail-closed release-grade outcome when external evidence is unsigned or signer-policy-invalid before policy-controlled release authorization.
